nasb.text: For it came about, when David was in Edom, and Joab the commander of the army had gone up to bury the slain, and had struck down every male in Edom

esv.text: For when David was in Edom, and Joab the commander of the army went up to bury the slain, he struck down every male in Edom

cnv.text: 從前大衛擊敗以東，元帥約押上去埋葬陣亡的人的時候，就把以東所有的男人都殺了。

ccb.text: 从前大卫征讨以东，元帅约押前去埋葬阵亡的人，将以东的男子都杀了。
